query: SELECT id, name, passportImageUrl, LEFT(CAST(passportOcrData AS CHAR), 80) as ocr_preview FROM registrations WHERE meetupId IS NULL AND passportOcrData IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id LIMIT 20;
